name: Aisha Rahman
bio: Met in freshman year of university. We studied computer science together and used to pull all-nighters before exams. She moved to Toronto after graduation.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: My former team lead at the startup I worked at in 2022. He taught me a lot about system design and always pushes me to think bigger.

name: Sofia Hernandez
bio: Grew up on the same street. Our families used to celebrate Eid and Christmas together. She's now a nurse in London.

name: Daniel Park
bio: Met at a local developer meetup in 2023. We started going to the gym together on weekends and built a side project that never launched.

name: Priya Nair
bio: We were in the same design elective in university. She's a UX designer now and has incredible taste. I always ask her to review my side project UIs.

name: James Okafor
bio: Met backpacking through Southeast Asia in 2021. We ended up traveling together for three weeks. He lives in Lagos and we catch up over video calls.

name: Lena Fischer
bio: We met through a language exchange app — she was learning English and I was learning German. We ended up working together remotely on a freelance project.

name: Tariq Hussain
bio: Our fathers were close friends. We grew up attending the same mosque and community events. He moved to Dubai for work and we rarely find the time to talk.
